member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.OpenAISettings
member.summary: Strongly-typed configuration bound from the "OpenAI" section in appsettings.json.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.OpenAISettings.ApiKey
member.summary: OpenAI API key from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.OpenAISettings.Model
member.summary: Chat model used for lead analysis (e.g. gpt-4o-mini).

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.OpenAISettings.ApiBaseUrl
member.summary: OpenAI Chat Completions API base URL.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoFieldQueryHelper
member.summary: Splits Zoho field API names into batches that respect the CRM API limit (50 fields per request).

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoFieldQueryHelper.BuildFieldBatches(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Builds one or more comma-separated field lists. Each batch includes id for record merging.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoSettings
member.summary: Strongly-typed configuration bound from the "Zoho" section in appsettings.json. Holds OAuth credentials and Zoho API endpoint URLs for the India data center.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoSettings.ClientId
member.summary: Zoho OAuth client ID from the API Console.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoSettings.ClientSecret
member.summary: Zoho OAuth client secret from the API Console.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoSettings.RefreshToken
member.summary: Long-lived refresh token obtained after the initial OAuth authorization flow.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoSettings.RedirectUri
member.summary: Redirect URI registered in the Zoho client; must match exactly.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoSettings.TokenStorageFilePath
member.summary: Relative path for demo JSON token persistence (under content root).

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoSettings.OAuthScopes
member.summary: OAuth scopes requested during the authorization step.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoSettings.AccountsUrl
member.summary: Zoho Accounts base URL (e.g. https://accounts.zoho.in for India DC).

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.Configuration.ZohoSettings.ApiBaseUrl
member.summary: Zoho CRM API base URL (e.g. https://www.zohoapis.in for India DC).

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.AIController
member.summary: AI-powered lead analysis, email drafting, and summarization via OpenAI.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.AIController.AnalyzeLead(System.String,ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadAnalysisRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Analyzes a Zoho CRM lead using OpenAI and returns structured JSON insights.
member.remarks:
**Workflow**
1. Fetches the lead from Zoho CRM (all fields + related Notes). 2. Extracts Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Description, and Notes. 3. Sends the context to OpenAI with a structured analysis prompt. 4. Returns JSON containing summary, next action, email draft, and quality score.
**Example response** ```json { "leadId": "123456789", "leadName": "Jane Doe", "company": "Acme Corp", "leadSummary": "...", "recommendedNextAction": "...", "followUpEmailDraft": "...", "leadQualityScore": 82, "model": "gpt-4o-mini" } ```
Configure `OpenAI:ApiKey` and `OpenAI:Model` in appsettings.json before calling.
member.param: Optional additional context for the AI prompt.
member.response: Lead analysis generated successfully.
Lead not found in Zoho CRM.
OpenAI API key missing from configuration.
OpenAI or Zoho API returned an error.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.AIController.GenerateEmail(System.String,ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadAnalysisRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a professional sales follow-up email for a Zoho CRM lead.
member.remarks:
Fetches lead context from Zoho CRM and returns only the email draft.
**Example response** ```json { "leadId": "123456789", "leadName": "Jane Doe", "emailDraft": "Subject: Following up on our conversation...", "model": "gpt-4o-mini" } ```
member.param: Optional additional context for the AI prompt.
member.response: Email draft generated successfully.
Lead not found in Zoho CRM.
OpenAI or Zoho API returned an error.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.AIController.GenerateSummary(System.String,ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadAnalysisRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a concise AI summary for a Zoho CRM lead.
member.remarks:
Fetches lead context from Zoho CRM and returns only the summary text.
**Example response** ```json { "leadId": "123456789", "leadName": "Jane Doe", "summary": "High-intent inbound lead from Acme Corp...", "model": "gpt-4o-mini" } ```
member.param: Optional additional context for the AI prompt.
member.response: Summary generated successfully.
Lead not found in Zoho CRM.
OpenAI or Zoho API returned an error.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.HealthController
member.summary: Health and connectivity checks for external integrations.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.HealthController.CheckZoho(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verifies Zoho OAuth and CRM API connectivity.
member.remarks:
Performs a live check: 1. Obtains a valid access token (auto-refreshes if expired). 2. Calls `GET /crm/v7/Leads?per_page=1` on Zoho CRM. 3. Returns success or failure with diagnostic details.
Example success response: ```json { "success": true, "message": "Zoho OAuth and CRM API are working correctly.", "accessTokenGenerated": true, "crmApiReachable": true, "httpStatusCode": 200, "checkedAtUtc": "2026-06-11T10:00:00+00:00" } ```
member.response: Health check completed (inspect `success` field for pass/fail).

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.LeadsController
member.summary: Exposes Zoho CRM Lead data through a REST API. Routes: GET /api/leads, GET /api/leads/test, GET /api/leads/{id}

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.LeadsController.GetTestLeads(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Step 6 — Returns the first 5 leads from Zoho CRM (quick test after OAuth).
member.remarks:
**OAuth Workflow — Step 6**
After completing OAuth and storing the refresh token, call this endpoint to verify lead retrieval. Returns at most 5 leads. Access tokens are refreshed automatically if expired.
Example response: ```json { "leads": [ { "id": "123456789", "firstName": "Jane", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "jane@example.com" } ], "count": 5, "page": 1, "perPage": 5, "moreRecords": true } ```
member.response: First 5 leads returned successfully.
OAuth not configured — complete the OAuth flow first.
Zoho CRM API returned an error.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.LeadsController.GetAllLeads(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all leads from Zoho CRM (first page).
member.remarks: Retrieves the first page of leads. Access tokens are refreshed automatically when expired.
member.response: Leads returned successfully.
Zoho CRM API returned an error.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.LeadsController.GetLeadById(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single lead by Zoho record ID.
member.param: Zoho CRM Lead record ID (numeric string).
member.response: Lead found and returned.
Lead not found in Zoho CRM.
Zoho CRM API returned an error.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.OAuthController
member.summary: Manages the Zoho OAuth 2.0 authorization workflow through Swagger-friendly REST endpoints.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.OAuthController.GetAuthorizationUrl
member.summary: Step 1 — Generate the Zoho OAuth authorization URL.
member.remarks:
**OAuth Workflow — Step 1**
Call this endpoint to receive a Zoho authorization URL. Open the `authorizationUrl` value in a browser, sign in to Zoho, and approve access.
Example response: ```json { "authorizationUrl": "https://accounts.zoho.in/oauth/v2/auth?scope=...", "redirectUri": "http://localhost:5000/api/oauth/callback", "scopes": "ZohoCRM.modules.leads.READ,...", "instructions": "Open AuthorizationUrl in a browser..." } ```
member.response: Authorization URL generated successfully.
Client ID or Client Secret is missing from configuration.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.OAuthController.Callback(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Step 4 — Exchange the authorization code for access and refresh tokens.
member.remarks:
**OAuth Workflow — Step 4**
After signing in to Zoho (Step 2), the browser is redirected to the callback URL with a `code` query parameter (Step 3). Pass that code here to obtain and store tokens.
Example callback URL from the browser: ``` http://localhost:5000/api/oauth/callback?code=1000.abc123.xyz&location=in ```
Example request: ``` GET /api/oauth/callback?code=1000.abc123.xyz ```
On success, the refresh token is saved to `Data/zoho-tokens.json` (Step 5).
member.param: Authorization code from the Zoho redirect URL (expires in ~60 seconds).
member.response: Tokens exchanged and stored successfully.
Authorization code is missing or invalid.
Zoho token endpoint returned an error.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.OAuthController.GetTokens
member.summary: Returns the current OAuth token status (access token, refresh token, expiry).
member.remarks: Example response: ```json { "accessToken": "1000.xxxxx", "refreshToken": "1000.yyyyy", "expiresAtUtc": "2026-06-11T12:00:00+00:00", "isAccessTokenValid": true, "hasRefreshToken": true, "message": "Access token is valid." } ```
member.response: Current token status returned.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Controllers.OAuthController.RefreshToken(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Step 5 — Force-refresh the access token using the stored refresh token.
member.remarks:
**OAuth Workflow — Step 5 (optional manual refresh)**
Generates a new access token from the stored refresh token. The Leads API also refreshes automatically when the access token expires.
Example response: ```json { "accessToken": "1000.newtoken", "refreshToken": "1000.yyyyy", "expiresAtUtc": "2026-06-11T13:00:00+00:00", "isAccessTokenValid": true, "hasRefreshToken": true, "message": "Access token is valid." } ```
member.response: Access token refreshed successfully.
No refresh token available — complete OAuth flow first.
Zoho token endpoint returned an error.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadAnalysisRequest
member.summary: Optional input for AI lead analysis endpoints.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadAnalysisRequest.AdditionalContext
member.summary: Extra instructions or context appended to the AI prompt.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadAnalysisResponse
member.summary: Structured AI analysis returned by POST /api/ai/analyze-lead/{leadId}.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadEmailResponse
member.summary: Response from POST /api/ai/generate-email/{leadId}.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadSummaryResponse
member.summary: Response from POST /api/ai/generate-summary/{leadId}.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadContextDto
member.summary: CRM fields extracted from a Zoho lead before sending to OpenAI.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.OpenAIAnalysisResult
member.summary: JSON shape expected from OpenAI for full lead analysis.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.OpenAIEmailResult
member.summary: JSON shape expected from OpenAI for email generation.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.OpenAISummaryResult
member.summary: JSON shape expected from OpenAI for summary generation.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.OAuthAuthorizeResponseDto
member.summary: Response returned by GET /api/oauth/authorize.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.OAuthAuthorizeResponseDto.AuthorizationUrl
member.summary: Full Zoho authorization URL — open in a browser to sign in.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.OAuthAuthorizeResponseDto.Instructions
member.summary: Human-readable next steps for the OAuth workflow.

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.OAuthAuthorizeResponseDto.RedirectUri
member.summary: Redirect URI embedded in the authorization URL (must match Zoho client settings).

member.name: P:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.OAuthAuthorizeResponseDto.Scopes
member.summary: OAuth scopes requested during authorization.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.ZohoTokenStatusDto
member.summary: Token status returned by GET /api/oauth/tokens and POST /api/oauth/refresh.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.OAuthCallbackResultDto
member.summary: Result of GET /api/oauth/callback after exchanging the authorization code.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.ZohoHealthCheckDto
member.summary: Result of GET /api/health/zoho connectivity check.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.ZohoLeadDto
member.summary: A Zoho Lead record with all CRM fields returned as a flat key/value map (Zoho API names).

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.ZohoLeadDto.MergeFields(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Merges additional field values into this lead (used when batching field requests).

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.ZohoLeadListResponseDto
member.summary: Paginated list response returned by GET /api/leads.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.ZohoTokenResponseDto
member.summary: Deserializes the JSON body returned by Zoho's OAuth token endpoint.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Models.StoredZohoTokens
member.summary: Persisted OAuth token state written to the demo JSON file and held in memory.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Models.ZohoApiResponse`1
member.summary: Generic wrapper for Zoho CRM v7 list/detail API responses.
member.typeparam: The record type contained in the data array.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Models.ZohoPaginationInfo
member.summary: Pagination metadata returned alongside list endpoints.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Models.ZohoErrorResponse
member.summary: Error payload returned by Zoho when a request fails.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Models.ZohoFieldsMetadataResponse
member.summary: Response from GET /crm/v7/settings/fields?module=Leads.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Models.ZohoFieldMetadataItem
member.summary: Single field definition in Zoho field metadata.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.Exceptions.OpenAIApiException
member.summary: Thrown when an OpenAI API call fails or returns an unexpected response.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.Exceptions.ZohoApiException
member.summary: Thrown when a Zoho CRM or OAuth API call fails or returns an unexpected response.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IOpenAIService
member.summary: OpenAI-powered lead analysis, email drafting, and summarization.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IOpenAIService.AnalyzeLeadAsync(System.String,ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadAnalysisRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches a lead from Zoho and returns a full AI analysis as JSON.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IOpenAIService.GenerateEmailAsync(System.String,ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadAnalysisRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a professional sales follow-up email for the lead.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IOpenAIService.GenerateSummaryAsync(System.String,ZohoAIAssistant.DTOs.LeadAnalysisRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a concise lead summary.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ITokenStorageService
member.summary: Persists Zoho OAuth tokens in memory and to a JSON file for demo purposes.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ITokenStorageService.GetStoredTokensAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the current stored token snapshot.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ITokenStorageService.SaveTokensAsync(System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves access and refresh tokens to memory and the JSON file.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ITokenStorageService.IsAccessTokenValid
member.summary: Returns true when a non-expired access token is available.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ITokenStorageService.GetEffectiveRefreshToken
member.summary: Returns the refresh token from storage, falling back to appsettings when storage is empty.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ITokenStorageService.GetTokenStatus
member.summary: Maps stored tokens to the API-facing status DTO.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoFieldMetadataService
member.summary: Retrieves and caches Leads module field API names from Zoho CRM field metadata.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoFieldMetadataService.GetLeadFieldBatchesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns comma-separated field batches (max 50 fields each) for Leads API requests.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoHealthService
member.summary: Verifies connectivity to Zoho CRM using the current OAuth token.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoLeadService
member.summary: Provides read access to Zoho CRM Lead records via the v7 REST API.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoLeadService.GetAllLeadsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all leads (first page) from Zoho CRM.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoLeadService.GetFirstLeadsAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves the first N leads from Zoho CRM (used by the test endpoint).

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoLeadService.GetLeadByIdAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a single lead by its Zoho record ID.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoLeadService.GetLeadNotesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves note text linked to a lead from the Zoho Notes related list.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoOAuthService
member.summary: Manages Zoho OAuth 2.0 authorization, token exchange, and automatic refresh.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoOAuthService.BuildAuthorizationUrl
member.summary: Builds the Zoho authorization URL for the browser-based OAuth flow.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoOAuthService.ExchangeAuthorizationCodeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exchanges an authorization code for access and refresh tokens and persists them.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoOAuthService.GetAccessTokenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a valid access token, refreshing automatically when expired or missing.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoOAuthService.RefreshAccessTokenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Forces a new access token to be generated from the refresh token.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.IZohoOAuthService.GetTokenStatus
member.summary: Returns the current token status from storage.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.LeadContextExtractor
member.summary: Pulls the key CRM fields from a Zoho lead dictionary for AI prompts.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.OpenAIService
member.summary: Calls the OpenAI Chat Completions API via after loading lead context from Zoho CRM.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.TokenStorageService
member.summary: Thread-safe token store backed by in-memory state and a JSON file on disk. On startup, loads any previously saved tokens; falls back to appsettings RefreshToken.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.TokenStorageService.LoadFromFile
member.summary: Loads token state from the JSON file if it exists.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.TokenStorageService.PersistToFileAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes the current token state to the JSON file.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ZohoFieldMetadataService
member.summary: Calls GET /crm/v7/settings/fields?module=Leads to discover all field API names, then caches the computed field batches for 24 hours.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ZohoHealthService
member.summary: Performs a live health check against Zoho CRM: obtains an access token (refreshing if needed) and calls the Leads API with per_page=1.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ZohoJsonHelper
member.summary: Converts Zoho CRM JSON payloads into API-friendly dictionaries.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ZohoJsonHelper.JsonElementToDictionary(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Converts a Zoho record JSON object into a flat dictionary.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ZohoJsonHelper.JsonElementToObject(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Recursively converts values to CLR types for JSON serialization.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ZohoLeadService
member.summary: Calls the Zoho CRM v7 Leads module. Automatically attaches a valid OAuth access token to every request via and fetches all module fields.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ZohoLeadService.FetchLeadsWithAllFieldsAsync(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches leads using every field batch and merges records by id. Zoho allows max 50 fields per request, so multiple batches are combined.

member.name: T:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ZohoOAuthService
member.summary: Handles the full Zoho OAuth 2.0 lifecycle: authorization URL generation, code exchange, token caching via , and automatic refresh.

member.name: M:ZohoAIAssistant.Services.ZohoOAuthService.RequestTokensAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: POSTs to the Zoho token endpoint and parses the response.
